attacking_style: Primarily exploits individual time trials rather than road attacks. ITT prowess positions him for GC before mountain stages, where climbing skills become relevant.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to identify clear team tactical patterns across multiple races.
terrain_preference: Strong in individual time trials, particularly hilly ITTs (18.4km with climbing to Santa Tème). Possesses climbing skills that allow GC defense in mountain stages rather than just flat TT ability.
vulnerability: Limited data, but profile suggests greater reliance on ITT gains than creating time gaps through road racing attacks.
key_patterns: Uses ITT performances to establish GC position before mountain stages begin.
Combines time trial specialization with climbing ability, not purely flat TT specialist.
form_trajectory: positive: First 2018 win at Paris-Nice suggests successful peak timing for early-season stage racing
